name: Zoom AI Companion
arrSource: Zoom FY26 narrative — AI Companion bundled free in paid plans; no discrete revenue. Editorial.

narrative.claimed: AI Companion bundled in paid Zoom plans (no incremental fee)
narrative.usage: High activation but immaterial revenue impact (no premium SKU)
narrative.flags: Bundled-free model means revenue impact is the seat-attach lift, not a discrete AI line.
